title: Today I Learned
text: ###May 2026 * May 23: Successfully initialized a Git repository, customized a Quarto YAML configuration, and deployed a site globally using GitHub Pages mapping to the /docs directory.

title: Post With Code
text: This is a post with executable code.

title: About
text: Hi, I’m Kamal, recent ECE graduate (Class of 2026) from the Chandigarh area. Like many, my college tech journey was a chaotic loop of starting languages, getting distracted by the rapid evolution of AI, and falling into the trap of passive “vibe coding”—blindly copy-pasting code from LLMs just to make things work. After graduating without a job and realizing how much time I wasted navigating the noise, I decided to break the cycle. I am joining this AI engineering cohort to build a rock-solid, hands-on foundation in RAG, LLM pipelines, and system orchestration. This blog is my space to stop procrastinating, trade passive tutorials for active shipping, and document my transition from a distracted graduate to a disciplined AI Engineer.
